title: bupleurum album
intro: Bupleurum album, also known as Chinese Thorowax or White Helleborine, is a type of flowering plant in the parsley family. It is a perennial plant native to China and Japan, used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of Bupleurum album are attributed to its flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to have immunomodulatory and anti-inflammatory effects, making it beneficial for various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Bupleurum album can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, and is often combined with other herbs like ginseng and licorice root to enhance its health benefits.
